type_definitions.name: LayerId
type_definitions.description: Newtype wrapper around an architecture-rules.json layer crate name; eliminates raw String at port and adapter boundaries

type_definitions.name: ContractMapContent
type_definitions.description: Newtype wrapper around a rendered contract-map mermaid markdown string; distinguishes render output from arbitrary strings at writer boundary

type_definitions.name: ContractMapRenderOptions
type_definitions.description: Render configuration carrying layers filter, kind_filter, signal_overlay, action_overlay, include_spec_source_edges; Phase 1 stubs the latter three fields for future phases

type_definitions.name: CatalogueLoader
type_definitions.description: Secondary port bulk-loading per-layer type catalogues from a track directory; returns the topologically sorted layer order and one TypeCatalogueDocument per tddd.enabled layer so callers do not need to re-derive topology

type_definitions.name: ContractMapWriter
type_definitions.description: Secondary port atomically writing rendered contract-map content into the track directory with symlink-safety guards

type_definitions.name: CatalogueLoaderError
type_definitions.description: Error variants returned by CatalogueLoader implementations

type_definitions.name: ContractMapWriterError
type_definitions.description: Error variants returned by ContractMapWriter implementations

type_definitions.name: TypeCatalogueDocument
type_definitions.description: Existing domain type used as a value (not defined or modified by this track). Declared with action=reference so the contract-map renderer can emit a method-call edge `CatalogueLoader -->|load_all| TypeCatalogueDocument` against this type. Both types reside in the domain layer; the edge is domain-internal. Reference declarations enrich the Contract Map visual without changing the type or the baseline.

type_definitions.name: ValidationError
type_definitions.description: Existing domain validation error enum; this track adds the `InvalidLayerId(String)` variant (T002) to support `LayerId` newtype validation. Declared here with action=modify so the TDDD reverse check recognises the intended structural change against baseline.

found_items: fn load_all(&self, track_id: &TrackId) -> Result<(Vec<LayerId>, BTreeMap<LayerId, TypeCatalogueDocument>), CatalogueLoaderError>
fn write(&self, track_id: &TrackId, content: &ContractMapContent) -> Result<(), ContractMapWriterError>
